# Baman Prasad Guragain (MrTrotid) - Portfolio

## About
Baman Prasad Guragain (MrTrotid) is a cybersecurity enthusiast and creative developer from Nepal. He is an A-Level graduate with Mathematics A and Computer Science A grades, currently building modern web applications and exploring security.

## Site Structure
- / (Home): Main portfolio with hero, about, skills, projects, experience, certifications, leadership, achievements, and contact sections
- /#about: About section with introduction and what I do
- /#projects: Projects section with AQ Sentinel, MeroAushadhi, and A-Level Past Paper Extractor
- /#experience: Work experience at Gadgetbyte Nepal as SEO Content Writer
- /#certifications: Interactive certifications grid (Cisco, AWS, Programiz, Cambridge)
- /#contact: Contact section with links to resume, projects, certifications, and social profiles

## Projects
1. AQ Sentinel - IoT air quality monitoring with ESP32 and React/Node.js
2. MeroAushadhi - Medicine information app with Google Generative AI and Supabase
3. A-Level Past Paper Extractor - Python desktop app using tkinter for downloading Cambridge past papers

## Certifications
- Networking Basics (Cisco, Mar 2026)
- Introduction to Cybersecurity (Cisco, Aug 2025)
- Complexity Calculation (Programiz, Aug 2024)
- 3rd Place - Cambridge Code League (Cambridge, Feb 2025)
- Introduction to Cybersecurity and Cloud Computing (Educational Institution, Aug 2025)

## Tech Stack
Next.js 14, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 3, Framer Motion 11, Playwright, Vitest, GitHub Actions
